mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, roles, remark, status, last_login_time, create_time, update_time
id, username, nickname, email, phone, roles, remark, status, last_login_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM sys_user
AND username != 'admin'
AND (username ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR nickname ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR email ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, email, phone, roles, remark, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{roles}, #{remark}, #{status})
